title: cranichis glabricaulis
intro: Cranichis glabricaulis, also known as the Naked Lip Orchid, is a species of terrestrial orchid native to the southeastern United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Cranichis glabricaulis include the potential treatment of wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to aid in the reduction of fever and alleviate pain. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve its leaves and stems being dried and ground into a powder or infused in hot water for medicinal use.
